title: AI 이미지 생성 마스터

resources.title: DALL-E 3 사용 가이드 (OpenAI)

resources.title: Ideogram 공식 사이트
resources.description: 텍스트 렌더링에 강한 AI 이미지 생성 도구 — 무료 플랜 있음

resources.title: Midjourney 공식 문서

resources.description: Stable Diffusion에서 원하는 이미지를 생성하는 프롬프트 작성 기법

resources.title: Midjourney로 프로급 이미지 만들기
resources.search_keyword: Midjourney 사용법 프롬프트 고급 기법 한국어

resources.title: AI Image Generation Masterclass
resources.search_keyword: AI image generation masterclass beginner advanced 2026

resources.title: Ideogram으로 텍스트 포함 이미지 만들기
resources.description: Ideogram.ai에서 로고, 썸네일, 포스터 등 텍스트가 포함된 이미지를 생성하는 실습
resources.command: ideogram.ai → 'minimalist poster with bold text "AI는 도구다", dark background, Korean typography' 입력

resources.title: DALL-E 3으로 상품 이미지 생성
resources.description: ChatGPT에서 DALL-E 3으로 제품 광고용 이미지를 생성하고 다양한 스타일로 변형하는 실습
resources.command: ChatGPT → '커피잔 제품 사진, 흰 배경, 스튜디오 조명, 고급스러운 상업 사진 스타일' 이미지 생성

quiz.question: Which AI tool is specifically mentioned for generating product advertisement images?
quiz.explanation: DALL-E 3 is highlighted for generating product advertisement images in the content.

quiz.question: What is a key feature of Midjourney as described in the content?
options: It provides a complete guide on parameters and styles
It is limited to logo creation
quiz.explanation: The content states that Midjourney includes a complete guide on parameters and styles.

quiz.question: Which technique is emphasized for generating images in Stable Diffusion?
quiz.explanation: The content emphasizes the technique of writing effective prompts to generate desired images in Stable Diffusion.

practicePrompts.label: Create a Fantasy Landscape
practicePrompts.instruction: Generate a stunning fantasy landscape using DALL-E 3.
practicePrompts.prompt: Create a vibrant fantasy landscape with floating islands, waterfalls, and a colorful sky.
practicePrompts.followUp: Try adding a mythical creature to the scene.

practicePrompts.label: Design a Modern Logo
practicePrompts.instruction: Use Ideogram.ai to create a logo for a tech startup.
practicePrompts.prompt: Generate a sleek and modern logo for a tech startup called 'Innovatech', featuring blue and silver colors.
practicePrompts.followUp: Experiment with different color schemes and styles.

practicePrompts.label: Generate a Product Advertisement
practicePrompts.instruction: Create a product advertisement image using DALL-E 3.
practicePrompts.prompt: Design an advertisement for a new smartwatch featuring a futuristic design and health monitoring features.
practicePrompts.followUp: Change the setting to a busy urban environment.
